# STAGATE spatial domain detection dependencies
# Install with: pip install -r requirements.txt
#
# NOTE: Install PyTorch first following https://pytorch.org/ for your CUDA version.
# Then install PyTorch Geometric following https://pytorch-geometric.readthedocs.io/

# Core dependencies
scanpy>=1.9.0
anndata>=0.8.0
numpy>=1.21.0
pandas>=1.3.0
matplotlib>=3.5.0
seaborn>=0.11.0
scikit-learn>=1.0.0
scipy>=1.7.0
tqdm>=4.62.0

# PyTorch & PyTorch Geometric
torch>=1.12.0
torch-geometric>=2.0.0

# STAGATE
# Install from GitHub: pip install git+https://github.com/QIFEIDKN/STAGATE.git
STAGATE
